senses.gloss: space into which a physical object is fitted, cubbyhole
space into which data is entered, field, column, box, and the like
the entry itself, its informational content
the rank of such an entry
the place in a numeral string of multiple digits (German Stelle)

etymology.text: Borrowed from Classical Persian خَانَه (xāna, “house”), or from خَان (ḵān, “caravanserai”) + ـَة (-a) in so far as a caravanserai offered a space to fit the camel or horse in.
